summary:
Claim: The school principal must report inappropriate touching by an uncle to the police.  
Evidence: - Under POCSO Act 2012, Section 6 mandates immediate reporting of all child sexual abuse incidents to police. - Family-based abuse occurs outside institutional settings but still falls under legal reporting obligations.  
Answer: D  

(498 tokens)

Agree D
